summary.title: Profile
summary.content:
Backend engineering leader with nearly 20 years of experience building product platforms, APIs, and distributed systems. My strongest hands-on background is in Node.js, TypeScript, NestJS, event-driven architecture, and performance work in fast-growing product environments.

At Riverside, I helped scale backend and platform systems during rapid growth, moving critical services out of a monolith and improving latency while staying close to architecture and delivery as I grew into management. I am especially drawn to backend roles where reliability, product judgment, and execution all matter at once.

roles.position: Senior Engineering Manager (Internal Title: Group Lead)
roles.description:
• Led a group of 27 engineers and managers across 4 teams, balancing delivery, technical direction, and org design during fast growth.

  • Acted as an architectural reviewer for backend and platform work across multiple groups, with final sign-off on complex features touching shared infrastructure.

  • Helped drive the backend from a monolith toward an event-driven architecture using Kafka and Protobuf so teams could scale and ship more independently.

  • Stayed close to system design, backend architecture, and engineering quality while also handling budgeting, compensation planning, and team design.

  • Ran high-volume hiring across multiple domains, with final technical sign-off for system design and backend interviews.

• Led the team responsible for core platform services and the main user dashboard, shipping work that crossed backend, product, and internal platform boundaries.

  • Built the company's first formal full-stack team from a previously flat structure, then hired and grew the team as the platform scope expanded.

  • Guided the extraction of critical services from the backend monolith, contributing to a 33% reduction in overall system latency.

  • Worked closely on API and platform design for high-traffic product surfaces, with a strong focus on reliability and performance.

items.name: Verba
items.description: Built a local-first speech-to-text app for macOS, including the product flow, licensing model, and on-device transcription pipeline. Combined transcription with local language-model cleanup so users can dictate without sending audio to the cloud.

items.name: Informia
items.description: Built an AI-assisted workflow for property registry processes in Argentina, covering document extraction, review, and browser-assisted submission. Extracts key fields from scanned deeds, shows supporting evidence, and uses context caching to reduce operating cost.

items.name: FallosES
items.description: Built a legal research assistant for Spain with a WhatsApp interface, lightweight web app, and grounded search over official sources. Maintains context and returns cited answers with concise summaries.

roles.description:
• Joined as an early engineer and worked on core backend systems during the product's early growth, using Node.js and NestJS in a fast-moving environment.

  • Resolved application and database bottlenecks, improving reliability, and became a go-to engineer for backend, APIs, and technical design tradeoffs.

items.description:
• Co-founded and led Streamix, a cloud platform for professional live video production built around real-time collaboration and broadcasting workflows.
  • Owned product strategy and technical direction, with hands-on work across streaming systems, backend services, and cross-platform product development.
  • Took the company from idea to market-ready SaaS, covering product, engineering, hiring, and go-to-market decisions.

• Co-founded and ran a digital agency for 11 years, leading delivery, client relationships, hiring, and operations.

  • Delivered web and mobile products for clients across the US, Spain, Argentina, Panama, and Mexico, building a strong foundation in product execution and software consulting.
